name: Lily
emotional_anchors: Adopting of a black kid from the same hospital on the same day
elaborate thanksgiving dinners while watching Forest Gump movies
calming_topics: Evening tea while reading the books
avoid_topics: loss of one kid during pregnancy while expecting triplets
avoid keeping mirror in front of the bed when they wake up
refusal to take closed door showers as a toddler because she forgot to turn the tap off
